summary: Made two surgical entry-side seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid repeating the next chapter's time-led 'By ...' scaffold, and added a brief note of June's silence since the previous night so chapter 4's fallout carries into the seminar without changing any scene beats. The existing closing image already hands cleanly into chapter 6, so the exit was left intact.
edits: Recast the opening paragraph from a time-led entry to a room-led entry while preserving the same lunch setup and tone.
Added a brief reference to June's silence since the previous night to carry forward chapter 4's unanswered-text tension.
